title: Rossini
original_title: Rossini, oder die mörderische Frage, wer mit wem schlief
overview: Zigeuner is on the hunt for the woman of his dreams, a woman who should also play the main role in the film. Meanwhile, ruthless producer Oskar Reiter wants to buy the film rights at all costs - and he is struggling for the love of the beautiful Valerie.

trailers.title: Rossini oder die mörderische Frage, wer mit wem schlief
